subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified be Thou, O my God and the God of all worlds, my Answerer and the Answerer of the distressed! I beseech Thee by the Word which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و اله العالمین و مجیبی و مجیب المضطرین اسئلک بالکلمه التی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
